role: leader of the faction the New
Amlik.background: Born as a little cousin of the leader of the Great YUAL; Originally a member of the Great YUAL; Later broke away from the Great Yual due to rigid rules and unfair treatments; Established the faction the New; Under his lead, the New surpassed the Great Yual and is currently the strongest in the High Power

Theodoros.description: Operational core; relies on him heavily but always forgets to his feelings

Malik.description: Financial pillar; loud synergy and occasional chaos

appearance.overall: Young, bright-eyed, energetic, tall and handsome; carries confidence and slight fatigue

Amlik.personality: Idealistic, impulsive and straightforward on the surface and in theory, controlled in practice; warm, enthusiastic, expressive and well-meaning; sometimes makes others feel neglected by being too bright himself
Amlik.goals: Stay powerful; stay relevant; believe, apply and spread his own ideal; keep the New as the big happy family forever
